channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: Hantavirus Outbreak: Two New Cases Confirmed; 10 Major Updates

media:content.media:description: Andes strain is the only type known to pass between humans

item.description: Spanish authorities, the WHO, and other health agencies are currently collaborating to ensure the safe disembarkation of passengers and crew while minimising the risk to the general public.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1097768/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Spanish authorities, the WHO, and other health agencies are currently collaborating to ensure the safe disembarkation of passengers and crew while minimising the risk to the general public.

item.title: Pak Minister's "Oridinary Worker" Of Asim Munir Remark Sparks Online Backlash

media:content.media:description: Senior television anchor Talat Hussain said it was "shameful" for ministers.

item.description: "When ministers begin introducing themselves as 'humble workers' of powerful men rather than representatives of the people, one has to ask -- is this democracy or the court of loyal servants?" wrote Fatima Malik on X.
item.content:encoded: "When ministers begin introducing themselves as 'humble workers' of powerful men rather than representatives of the people, one has to ask -- is this democracy or the court of loyal servants?" wrote Fatima Malik on X.

item.title: Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella To Testify In Elon Musk vs OpenAI Lawsuit

media:content.media:description: Nadella's testimony will precede that of OpenAI boss Sam Altman.

item.description: Elon Musk accuses OpenAI of betraying its original nonprofit mission and misappropriating his founding donations to build a $850 billion empire.
item.content:encoded: Elon Musk accuses OpenAI of betraying its original nonprofit mission and misappropriating his founding donations to build a $850 billion empire.

item.title: Iran Hangs Man Convicted Of Spying, Leaking Secrets To Mossad, US

media:content.media:description: Erfan Shakourzadeh worked at one of Iran's "scientific organisations active in the satellite field."

item.description: The Islamic Republic of Iran executed at least 1,500 people last year, one of the highest numbers worldwide, according to Iran Human Rights.
item.content:encoded: The Islamic Republic of Iran executed at least 1,500 people last year, one of the highest numbers worldwide, according to Iran Human Rights.

item.title: Iran War Could Make Trump's Trip To China A Bit Chillier Than His Last Visit

media:content.media:description: Trump will arrive in Beijing on the night of May 13.

item.description: Donald Trump is expected to arrive in Beijing on Wednesday night and will take part in a welcome ceremony with Xi Jinping the next day.
item.content:encoded: Donald Trump is expected to arrive in Beijing on Wednesday night and will take part in a welcome ceremony with Xi Jinping the next day.

item.title: PM Modi Calls For WFH, Travel Curbs Amid Oil Price Hike. What Other Nations Did

media:content.media:description: PM Modi said reducing gold imports and foreign travel would help conserve foreign currency reserves

item.description: New Delhi is the latest among a growing number of Asian economies calling for lower energy consumption amid skyrocketing fuel prices due to Iran tensions.
item.content:encoded: New Delhi is the latest among a growing number of Asian economies calling for lower energy consumption amid skyrocketing fuel prices due to Iran tensions.

item.title: China Is Mining The Iran War For Lessons On US Military Power
item.description: China is studying two wars at once: Op Sindoor for lessons on Indian air defence and Chinese-backed Pakistani systems, and the Iran war for U.S. strike doctrine, AI targeting and air-defence saturation - with Taiwan as the likely endgame.
item.content:encoded: China is studying two wars at once: Op Sindoor for lessons on Indian air defence and Chinese-backed Pakistani systems, and the Iran war for U.S. strike doctrine, AI targeting and air-defence saturation - with Taiwan as the likely endgame.

item.title: Middle East Conflicts Pose A Danger To Whales Off South Africa: Study

media:content.media:description: Collisions, which are largely underreported, are a "major cause of mortality for whales."

item.description: Environmental scientists, activists and even social media posts have highlighted the dangers of maritime traffic for sea mammals.
item.content:encoded: Environmental scientists, activists and even social media posts have highlighted the dangers of maritime traffic for sea mammals.

item.title: Can ChatGPT Be Charged In A Murder? Florida's Attorney Wants To Find Out

media:content.media:description: OpenAI, for its part, insists ChatGPT bears no responsibility for the attack.

item.description: A student had asked ChatGPT which weapon and ammunition would be best suited for his attack, and when and where he could inflict the most casualties.
item.content:encoded: A student had asked ChatGPT which weapon and ammunition would be best suited for his attack, and when and where he could inflict the most casualties.

item.title: "Family Table Was Left Empty": Hantavirus Renews Memories Of 2018 Outbreak

media:content.media:description: Mailen Valle lost her father and two sisters during the 2018-2019 hantavirus outbreak.

item.description: Human-to-human transmission of hantavirus was first discovered in 1996 in the a town near El Bolson, was later found to have happened in Epuyen.
item.content:encoded: Human-to-human transmission of hantavirus was first discovered in 1996 in the a town near El Bolson, was later found to have happened in Epuyen.

item.title: Opinion: Opinion | What's Behind Araghchi's Visit To China Right Before Trump-Xi Meeting?
item.description: Beijing remains indispensable to Tehran as an economic backer and diplomatic shield, but it is not prepared to become its war ally.
item.content:encoded: Beijing remains indispensable to Tehran as an economic backer and diplomatic shield, but it is not prepared to become its war ally.

item.title: Hantavirus, Covid, Norovirus, Legionnaires': Why Are Cruise Ships So Prone To Disease Outbreaks?
item.description: Cruises are sold as floating holidays, but they are also useful for understanding public health. Cruise ships are carefully designed places where many people live, eat, relax and move through the same shared spaces for days at a time.
item.content:encoded: Cruises are sold as floating holidays, but they are also useful for understanding public health. Cruise ships are carefully designed places where many people live, eat, relax and move through the same shared spaces for days at a time.

item.title: UK Army Air-Drops Medical Support To Remote Island Battling Hantavirus

media:content.media:description: One of the three British nationals diagnosed with Hantavirus is on the South Atlantic island.

item.description: One of the three British nationals diagnosed with suspected hantavirus connected to the outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship is currently on the island
item.content:encoded: One of the three British nationals diagnosed with suspected hantavirus connected to the outbreak on the MV Hondius cruise ship is currently on the island

item.title: Why Brain Implants Are More Than A Sci-Fi Fantasy

media:content.media:description: Neuralink leads with implants in 20 patients and aims for 20,000 implants annually by 2031.

item.description: The technology is still nascent and the number of people who have received implants is only in the hundreds.
item.content:encoded: The technology is still nascent and the number of people who have received implants is only in the hundreds.

item.title: Hantavirus Case Confirmed As Evacuated American Passenger Tests Positive, Another French Passenger Falls Ill
item.description: Passengers evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship began flying home aboard military and government planes Sunday after the vessel anchored in the Canary Islands.
item.content:encoded: Passengers evacuated from the hantavirus-hit cruise ship began flying home aboard military and government planes Sunday after the vessel anchored in the Canary Islands.

item.title: Iran's Fact Check As Satellites Show Suspected Oil Leak Near Kharg Island

media:content.media:description: This satellite image obtained from Copernicus Sentinel Data 2026 on May 8

item.description: The incident comes as the Trump administration ramps up "Economic Fury" on Tehran, tightening sanctions and increasing the US naval presence near Hormuz to curb Iran's oil exports.
item.content:encoded: The incident comes as the Trump administration ramps up "Economic Fury" on Tehran, tightening sanctions and increasing the US naval presence near Hormuz to curb Iran's oil exports.

item.title: Iran Made A '3rd Country' Offer On Uranium Stockpile To US: Report

media:content.media:description: Conflict has raised energy prices and disrupted oil flows through the strategic Strait of Hormuz.

item.description: The US president proposed that Iran permit passage through the Strait of Hormuz and Washington end its blockade on Iranian ports in the next month.
item.content:encoded: The US president proposed that Iran permit passage through the Strait of Hormuz and Washington end its blockade on Iranian ports in the next month.

item.title: Indian-Origin Philanthropist Pays Off Student Loans For 176 Graduates In US: "Pursue Your Goals"

media:content.media:description: He tied the gesture to his father's story.

item.description: The announcement drew a standing ovation from stunned students and families, as for many, the relief is life-changing.
item.content:encoded: The announcement drew a standing ovation from stunned students and families, as for many, the relief is life-changing.

item.title: US-Iran War News LIVE Updates: Trump Warns Iran Against Moving Uranium, Says US Keeping An Eye
item.description: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships
item.content:encoded: US-Iran Ceasefire Live Updates: A US admiral said US forces sank six small Iranian ships. Iran denied any had been sunk and earlier fired warning shots at US warships

item.title: US Man Sets World Record With Massive Collection Of 3,482 Bearbrick Toy

media:content.media:description: Bearbricks were first introduced in 2001 by Tatsuhiko Akashi.

item.description: He collected an impressive 3,482 pieces of merchandise from the popular Bearbrick brand.
item.content:encoded: He collected an impressive 3,482 pieces of merchandise from the popular Bearbrick brand.
